cmd:
if [ -z "$N8N_API_KEY" ]; then echo NO_KEY; exit 0; fi
python3 - <<'PY'
import json,urllib.request,os
key=os.environ.get("N8N_API_KEY","")
base="https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/api/v1"
ids=["bB1o1593vdzL1Diy","JQKA35haUsXU4XqE","GGnGKrjyuCU3nrcC","zVlHFJCe0Afy0kMU","FC3qzaxp5M89LpI7","1YdXnLFOXI85IsWv","GIhQk0ETziCTYgTB"]
seen=set()
for wid in ids:
    req=urllib.request.Request(base+"/workflows/"+wid,headers={"X-N8N-API-KEY":key})
    try:
        d=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(req,timeout=20))
    except Exception as e:
        print(wid,"ERR",str(e)[:60]);continue
    for n in d.get("nodes",[]):
        for ctype,cval in (n.get("credentials") or {}).items():
            k=(ctype,cval.get("id"))
            if k in seen:continue
            seen.add(k)
            print(ctype,"|",cval.get("id"),"|",cval.get("name"))
PY
